Title: The debiased compositional distribution of MITHNEOS: Global match 
       between the near-Earth and main-belt asteroid populations, and excess 
       of D-type NEOs 
Authors: Marsset M., DeMeo F.E., Burt B., Polishook D., Binzel R.P., 
    Granvik M., Vernazza P., Carry B., Bus S.J., Slivan S.M., Thomas C., 
    Moskovitz N., Rivkin A.S. 
Table: Complete tabulation

   1- 32 A32    ---     File       Spectrum filename
  34- 39 I6     ---     Number     ?="" Near-Earth Object Number
  41- 50 A10    ---     Desig      Provisional designation

  66- 74 F9.7   au      a          Semi-major Axis
